content_blocks.text:
648 
chapter 18
Congratulations!
You made it to the end.
Wouldn’t it be 
dreamy if this were the end 
of the book? If there were no 
more bullet points or puzzles 
or code listings or anything else? 
But that’5 probably just a 
fantasy...
Of course, there’5 still the two appendices.
And the index.
And then there’5 the web site...
There’5 no escape, really.
the end... sort of

648 
chapter 18
Congratulations!
You made it to the end.
Wouldn’t it be 
dreamy if this were the end 
of the book? If there were no 
more bullet points or puzzles 
or code listings or anything else? 
But that’5 probably just a 
fantasy...
Of course, there’5 still the two appendices.
And the index.
And then there’5 the web site...
There’5 no escape, really.
the end... sort of
